variants: Rehema Kato has made her mark in the world of invention while calling Radiant Pine Reach her home. Originally from Plumridge Crossing, she is well-known for her innovative contributions, which earned her the Violet Anchor Citation. One of her key creations is the Umbra Link Array, inspiring interest across various communities. Outside of her professional achievements, Rehema actively participates in the Lanternlit Kitewrights, a group where she enjoys the artistry of kite crafting and flying.
